feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: Gradual emergence of temporal structures depending on the distance between neighboring callers in natural habitat of male treefrogs
entry.content:
Authors: I Aihara, R Takeda, M Shirasaka, D Kominami... -arXivpreprintarXiv..., 2026

Abstract: Acoustic animals (eg, insects and frogs) aggregate and produce sounds for mating. Well-organized chorus structures like call alternation and call synchrony indicate the importance of the precise control of call timing by individual males. However, the ...

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: NLP Occupational Emergence Analysis: How Occupations Form and Evolve in Real Time--A Zero-Assumption Method Demonstrated on AI in the US Technology ...
entry.content:
Authors: D Nordfors -arXivpreprintarXiv:2603.15998, 2026

Abstract: Occupations form and evolve faster than classification systems can track. We propose that a genuine occupation is a self-reinforcing structure (a bipartite co-attractor) in which a shared professional vocabulary makes practitioners cohesive as a group ...

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: Biomedical active matter: Emergence and breakdown of collective functionalities
entry.content:
Authors: A Mathijssen, H Almohammadi, L Altman, T Calazans... -arXivpreprintarXiv..., 2026

Abstract: Living systems are made of active materials with microscopic components that work together to perform macroscopic biological tasks. The breakdown of these collective functionalities leads to diseases, which, conversely, could be treated by exploiting ...

entry.title: PrimeBiome Reviews (Final Summary): Is It Worth Trying for Gut?

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: S Steen

Abstract: ... PrimeBiome's prebiotic fiber blend, containing ingredients like acacia gum and inulin, has been clinically proven to promote the growth of beneficial bacteria and improve gut health. A systematic review published in Nutrients found that fiber ...

entry.title: Gut microbiota modulation of Wolffia globosa (Roxb.) Hartog & Plas and synbiotic effect with probiotic strain Lactiplantibacillus plantarum HM04-80 in an in vitro ...

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: R Kaewsaen, O Honwichit, K Mok, M Nakphaichit... - Journal of Agriculture and ..., 2026

Abstract: Duckweed, Wolffia globosa (Roxb.) Hartog & Plas, has gained attention as a highly nutritious food source due to its rich protein and dietary fiber content. This study aimed to investigate the chemical composition and digestibility of dried duckweed ...

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: N Pal, B Jash - Chemical Communications, 2026

Abstract: ... Among others, the reductive Tricarboxylic Acid (rTCA) cycle is regarded as a central metabolic route in prebiotic chemistry, and it has been ... chemistry within prebiotic geochemical environments is essential to understand the origins of ...

entry.title: Process optimization of Pediococcus pentosaceus 4412-derived exopolysaccharides as a prebiotic in banana pseudostem juice fermentation

entry.content:

Abstract: ... prebiotic potential of EPS-4412 in the fermentation of banana pseudostem juice (FBPJ) was evaluated by monitoring viable probiotic cell counts, and the process was further optimized using CCD-based RSM, resulting in a 3.67-fold increase in ...

Journal: 2026

Abstract: Prebiotic carbohydrates have gained increasing attention due to their ability to selectively ... A variety of carbohydrate-based substrates exhibit prebiotic properties, including fructans, ... next-generation prebiotic ingredients aimed at targeted ...

entry.title: Structural modification and enhanced prebiotic potential of Rosa roxburghii Tratt polysaccharides by Lacticaseibacillus paracasei fermentation

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: H Qiu, Y Luo, A Song, Y Huang - Journal of Agriculture and Food Research, 2026

Abstract: Rosa roxburghii Tratt polysaccharides (RRTP) possess a wide range of bioactivities; however, studies focused on modifying RRTP are scarce. This study aimed to reveal the influence of fermentation by Lacticaseibacillus paracasei FBKL 1.0328 on the ...

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
